text:
I'm working hard on this. It's a huge undertaking. Planned for demonstratio=
n at BSDCan 2013.

The code is being staged in HEAD at usr.sbin/bsdconfig (and later, I will u=
pdate bsdinstall to use bsdconfig's media selection dialog -- just a simple=
 include).
--=20
Devin
